local_copy_packet.markdown:
# Manual Note Temp DB Single-Claim Result Review

Result review only. No DB is opened and no SQL is executed.
review_status: temp_result_review_needs_attention
attention_note: Ready to proceed to result contract tests, but optional report-backed evidence is incomplete.
result_status: temp_db_write_passed
temp_db_path: /tmp/augnes-single-claim-write-prototype-v0-1/single-claim-prototype.sqlite

## Temp Record Summary
- temp_claim_records: 1
- temp_idempotency_records: 1
- temp_rollback_records: 1
- temp_review_audit_records: 1

## Product Write Boundary
normal_product_write_enabled=false
product_db_write=false
actual_promotion_performed=false
proof_or_evidence_writes=false
perspective_or_canonical_writes=false
canonical_graph_write=false
work_item_creation=false

## Next
